description: Literary. A beautiful and very large (30cm) page from a diwan of R. Moshe ibn 'Ezra. Among the poems preserved: on pens, on a candle, one that he wrote to Yehudah b Abi l-Hajjaj his brother; his elegy for Abū Ibrahīm Isḥāq b. Barūn [Benveniste]; his elegy for Barukh b. Barukh. ASE.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
